title: Fix Object Dropdown Defaulting to Last Item When Drilling Into Scorecard
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the object dropdown to show the object I clicked on when drilling into the scorecard, so that I see the correct context without having to manually reselect.
description: When clicking on any object (e.g., Account) in the scorecard to drill in, the upper-right dropdown always defaulted to the last item in the picklist (e.g., User) instead of the selected object. The dropdown needed to be dynamically set to match the drilled-into object.
acceptance_criteria: Object dropdown reflects the drilled-into object when navigating from scorecard
Dropdown does not default to the last picklist item
ux_changes: Object dropdown dynamically set to match the selected scorecard object on drill-in.
middleware_changes: Pass selected object context to the detail view to set dropdown correctly.
implementation_notes: Fixed by dynamically setting the dropdown value based on the drilled-into object.
comment_summary: Waqar asked for clarification, Ryan updated the description with more detail. Waqar fixed and delivered.
